description: Risk Knowledge Base for Telecom & Security System RFQ Bid Analysis. Encodes risk rules across 6 dimensions derived from engineering checklists, SAES standards, TBE criteria, and industry best practices.

D1_STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE.name: Standards Compliance
D1_STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE.description: Risks arising from missing, outdated, or non-compliant references to Saudi Aramco (SAES/SAMSS), international (IEC/IEEE), and security (SAIS) standards.

rules.check: SAES standard referenced in spec but marked HOLD/Missing in MR
rules.trigger_condition: Standard appears in spec but project MR lists it as HOLD or Missing
rules.mitigation: Obtain latest revision of the standard from Saudi Aramco or request formal waiver via SAEP-302.

rules.check: CCTV specification missing SAES-T-555 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers CCTV/video surveillance but does not reference SAES-T-555
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-555 (Video Surveillance Systems) to reference list and verify compliance.

rules.check: PAGA specification missing SAES-T-481 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers PAGA/voice paging but does not reference SAES-T-481
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-481 (In-Plant Voice Paging System) to reference list and verify compliance.

rules.check: Radio specification missing SAES-T-493 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers radio systems but does not reference SAES-T-493
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-493 (Mobile and Fixed Radio Systems) to reference list.

rules.check: Security specification missing SAES-O-205 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers security systems but does not reference SAES-O-205
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-O-205 (Security Systems for Industrial Facilities) to reference list.

rules.check: OSP cabling missing SAES-T-911 or SAES-T-928 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers outside plant cabling but does not reference SAES-T-911 or SAES-T-928
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-911 (Conduit System Design) and SAES-T-928 (OSP Buried Plant) to reference list.

rules.check: International standard referenced without edition year
rules.trigger_condition: International standard reference lacks edition or year identifier
rules.mitigation: Clarify applicable edition year for each international standard reference.

rules.check: SAIS security directive not referenced for security scope
rules.trigger_condition: Security spec does not reference applicable SAIS directives (SEC-01, SEC-05, SEC-07, SEC-09)
rules.mitigation: Verify and add all applicable SAIS directives to the reference section.

rules.check: Grounding standard SAES-T-795 not referenced
rules.trigger_condition: Spec mentions grounding/bonding but does not reference SAES-T-795
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-795 (Grounding, Bonding and Electrical Protection) to reference list.

rules.check: Fiber optic cabling missing SAES-T-624 reference
rules.trigger_condition: Spec covers fiber optic cabling but does not reference SAES-T-624
rules.mitigation: Add SAES-T-624 (Fiber Optic Cables for OSP and Inter/Intra Building) to reference list.

D2_SCOPE_COMPLETENESS.name: Scope Completeness
D2_SCOPE_COMPLETENESS.description: Risks from missing subsystems, locations, equipment categories, or scope boundaries that leave gaps in the bid package.

rules.check: Missing subsystem in specification scope
rules.trigger_condition: A subsystem expected per MR (e.g., PIDS, ACS, CCTV, IT-ACS) is not covered in the specification
rules.mitigation: Identify missing subsystem and request supplementary specification from client or issue RFI.

rules.check: Scope location not covered for all buildings
rules.trigger_condition: Building/area mentioned in project scope but no equipment or system assigned to it in the spec
rules.mitigation: Cross-reference all scope locations against system block diagrams and confirm coverage.

rules.check: Hazardous area scope gap — no ATEX/IECEx requirement stated
rules.trigger_condition: Equipment is installed in classified areas but spec does not state ATEX/IECEx certification requirement
rules.mitigation: Add explicit ATEX/IECEx certification requirements for all equipment in classified areas.

rules.check: Battery/UPS backup duration not specified
rules.trigger_condition: Active equipment mentioned but no battery backup duration specified
rules.mitigation: Specify battery backup duration per MR requirements (30/60 min telecom, 4-8 hrs PAGA, 2 hrs SACS).

rules.check: Spare parts scope undefined
rules.trigger_condition: Spec mentions equipment supply but does not define spare parts requirements (commissioning + 2-year operational)
rules.mitigation: Add spare parts section specifying commissioning spares (base) and 2-year operational spares (option).

rules.check: Special tools not specified
rules.trigger_condition: No special tools requirement listed for system maintenance and installation
rules.mitigation: Include special tools in vendor scope of supply.

rules.check: Anti-drone or perimeter extension scope ambiguity
rules.trigger_condition: Spec mentions anti-drone or perimeter scope changes without clear boundary definition
rules.mitigation: Clarify exact perimeter length, fence type, and relocation scope with client.

rules.check: Contractor vs Vendor scope boundary unclear
rules.trigger_condition: Spec uses both CONTRACTOR and VENDOR without clear delineation of responsibilities
rules.mitigation: Map scope boundaries to Scope of Supply Checklist (Appendix 1) and clarify in deviation list.

D3_TECHNICAL_ADEQUACY.name: Technical Adequacy
D3_TECHNICAL_ADEQUACY.description: Risks from insufficient, missing, or non-compliant technical parameters that affect system design and performance.

rules.check: CCTV resolution not specified or below minimum
rules.trigger_condition: CCTV spec does not state camera resolution or states below 1080p minimum
rules.mitigation: Specify minimum 1080p (Full HD) H.264/H.265 IP-based cameras per SAES-T-555.

rules.check: NVR storage calculation missing or insufficient
rules.trigger_condition: CCTV spec does not specify storage days, RAID level, or retention period
rules.mitigation: Specify minimum 30-day continuous recording with RAID 6 redundancy at 15 IPS.

rules.check: Redundancy not specified for critical equipment
rules.trigger_condition: Core equipment (controllers, servers, switches) mentioned without redundancy specification
rules.mitigation: Specify 1+1 hot-standby for core processors/controllers and N+1 for amplifiers per MR defaults.

rules.check: IP rating below outdoor minimum
rules.trigger_condition: Outdoor equipment specified with IP rating below IP65
rules.mitigation: Specify minimum IP65 for outdoor plant areas, IP66 for coastal/corrosive environments.

rules.check: ACS RFID frequency not specified or non-standard
rules.trigger_condition: ACS card readers specified without confirming 13.56 MHz RFID standard
rules.mitigation: Specify 13.56 MHz RFID protocol (ISO/IEC 18000-3 or Mifare/DESFire) per SAES-O-205.

rules.check: Cable distance exceeds Cat 6 limit
rules.trigger_condition: Cat 6 horizontal cabling runs indicated beyond 90m patch panel to outlet limit
rules.mitigation: Add intermediate telecom closets or switch to fiber optic for runs exceeding 90m.

rules.check: Fire alarm integration missing for ACS
rules.trigger_condition: ACS electric locks mentioned but no fire alarm integration (fail-safe release) specified
rules.mitigation: Specify fail-safe electric lock release upon fire alarm signal from FACP per life safety codes.

rules.check: No coverage study referenced for area-based system
rules.trigger_condition: Area-based system (PAGA/CCTV/WiFi/Radio) specified without reference to coverage study or map
rules.mitigation: Require coverage studies (acoustic for PAGA, FOV for CCTV, RF heat map for WiFi/Radio) as deliverables.

rules.check: LDC autonomous operation not specified for ACS
rules.trigger_condition: ACS system described but local controllers not specified to operate autonomously when disconnected from server
rules.mitigation: Specify that LDCs must store card database and events locally for autonomous operation during network failure.

rules.check: CCTV camera washing system not specified for process areas
rules.trigger_condition: PTZ process cameras specified for dusty/sandy environments without washing system requirement
rules.mitigation: Specify pressure washing system (tank, pump, wiper) for all PTZ process cameras in outdoor areas.

rules.check: EPOB/muster station integration not specified
rules.trigger_condition: ACS system specified without Electronic Personnel On Board (EPOB) functionality at muster stations
rules.mitigation: Specify EPOB muster station readers at assembly points with real-time roll call capability.

rules.check: Network cybersecurity not addressed
rules.trigger_condition: Network/data system specified but no cybersecurity measures (firewall, IPS, DMZ, encryption) defined
rules.mitigation: Specify firewall, IPS/IDPS, network segmentation (DMZ), and encryption per SAES-T-566.

D4_DOCUMENTATION_GAPS.name: Documentation Gaps
D4_DOCUMENTATION_GAPS.description: Risks from missing, incomplete, or unavailable drawings, studies, calculations, and vendor deliverables.

rules.check: Drawing referenced in spec but marked HOLD/Missing in MR
rules.trigger_condition: Drawing number appears in specification but is listed as HOLD/Missing in the MR drawing register
rules.mitigation: Obtain missing drawing from FEED contractor or flag as bid assumption with cost contingency.

rules.check: No block diagram provided for subsystem
rules.trigger_condition: Subsystem described in spec but no system/block diagram referenced or available
rules.mitigation: Request system block diagram from FEED contractor or develop one as part of vendor design scope.

rules.check: FAT/SAT procedure not defined
rules.trigger_condition: Testing/commissioning section exists but no FAT/SAT procedure or criteria defined
rules.mitigation: Include FAT/SAT procedure template in VDR requirements; define acceptance criteria.

rules.check: Design basis document not referenced
rules.trigger_condition: Spec does not reference a telecom design basis document
rules.mitigation: Request project telecom design basis document or develop assumptions list.

rules.check: Electrical load calculation not provided
rules.trigger_condition: Active equipment specified but no electrical load calculation document referenced
rules.mitigation: Request or develop electrical load calculation including UPS sizing.

rules.check: Bandwidth/storage calculation not provided for CCTV
rules.trigger_condition: CCTV system specified but no bandwidth or storage sizing calculation referenced
rules.mitigation: Develop bandwidth and storage calculation based on camera count, resolution, frame rate, and retention period.

rules.check: Cable schedule or MTO not referenced
rules.trigger_condition: Cabling scope described but no cable schedule, routing, or MTO document referenced
rules.mitigation: Develop cable MTO with 10% waste factor and 3m/5m slack allowances per MR defaults.

D5_INTERFACE_COORDINATION.name: Interface Coordination
D5_INTERFACE_COORDINATION.description: Risks from undefined or unclear interfaces between telecom/security systems and other disciplines (civil, electrical, HVAC, piping, fire safety).

rules.check: Civil/structural interface missing for towers or poles
rules.trigger_condition: Equipment towers/poles specified but no civil foundation design interface defined
rules.mitigation: Transmit tower/pole weight, dimensions, and wind load to civil team for foundation design.

rules.check: Electrical interface undefined for cabinet power
rules.trigger_condition: Active cabinets specified but no electrical power interface (UPS feeder, voltage, circuit breaker) defined
rules.mitigation: Define electrical load per cabinet and transmit to electrical discipline for UPS distribution board sizing.

rules.check: HVAC heat dissipation data not transmitted
rules.trigger_condition: Active equipment in enclosed rooms but no heat dissipation data specified for HVAC sizing
rules.mitigation: Calculate and transmit total heat load (Watts/BTU) for all equipment rooms to HVAC team.

rules.check: Cable tray routing clash potential
rules.trigger_condition: Telecom cable routing specified but no minimum clearance from power cables stated
rules.mitigation: Specify minimum 300-500mm clearance between telecom and power cable trays per EMI requirements.

rules.check: Fire alarm system integration gap
rules.trigger_condition: Security system described but interface with fire alarm control panel not defined
rules.mitigation: Define FACP interface for ACS fail-safe lock release and PAGA alarm zone activation.

rules.check: Integration with existing plant systems undefined
rules.trigger_condition: Spec mentions integration with existing systems but no interface protocol/method specified
rules.mitigation: Define integration protocol, physical interface points, and commissioning sequence for existing systems.

rules.check: Underground routing coordination missing
rules.trigger_condition: Underground cabling specified but no coordination with civil/piping for trench routing
rules.mitigation: Coordinate underground telecom routes with civil duct bank design and piping layout.

D6_COMMERCIAL_SCHEDULE.name: Commercial & Schedule
D6_COMMERCIAL_SCHEDULE.description: Risks related to pricing, lead times, warranty, training, and schedule that affect bid competitiveness and execution.

rules.check: Long-lead items not identified
rules.trigger_condition: Custom or explosion-proof equipment specified without lead time consideration
rules.mitigation: Identify all ATEX/IECEx-certified and custom-engineered items as long-lead; flag for early ordering.

rules.check: Training scope undefined or insufficient
rules.trigger_condition: System requires operator training but training plan is vague or duration not specified
rules.mitigation: Define training scope: duration, location, number of attendees, curriculum, and certification.

rules.check: Warranty terms ambiguous
rules.trigger_condition: No clear warranty period, coverage scope, or start date defined
rules.mitigation: Specify warranty period (min 12 months from startup or 18 months from shipping) per MR terms.

rules.check: Site supervision requirements unclear
rules.trigger_condition: Installation/commissioning scope mentions supervision but days/rate not defined
rules.mitigation: Specify site supervision duration (man-days) and quote per diem rate in bid.

rules.check: Phased delivery not addressed
rules.trigger_condition: Large system scope without delivery phasing or prioritization strategy
rules.mitigation: Define delivery milestones aligned with construction completion sequence.

rules.check: Software licensing model unclear
rules.trigger_condition: System requires software but licensing model (perpetual vs subscription) not specified
rules.mitigation: Clarify software licensing model and include lifecycle cost (5-10 years) in bid evaluation.
